title: ContentOps Master Data Architecture Schema
description: Governs the application state for Human-in-the-Loop content operations, topical map indexing, and deterministic asset deployment.

systemConfig.description: Defines the infrastructural operational parameters and token economic thresholds.

runtimeTier.description: The active commercial operational layer assigned to the workstation domain.

nodeCapacityCap.description: The maximum absolute node limit allowed before upgrade protocols are triggered.

byokEnabled.description: Mandatory parameter passing API compute costs directly to user keys to eliminate Token Debt risk.

brandingGrounding.description: The Master Memory Card structure used to ground AI agents and hard-stop context history drift.

storybrandPersonaReport.description: The ideological framework mapping the user as the Hero and the product as the guide.

styleGuidelineVibe.description: The specific guardrails dictates the tone of voice and emotional frequency of the prose clones.

brandVillains.description: The array of designated pathogens (e.g., The Green Light Gaslighter, Tool Overlords).

nodes.description: The central repository node matrix managing individual content architecture blocks.

id.description: Unique technical identifier matching the schema directory path.

title.description: The descriptive onscreen H1 headline asset.

clusterTaxonomy.description: The designated structural archipelago mapping this page to its semantic continent.

topicalMapPosition.description: The spatial coordinate within the local authority fortress phalanx.

targetKeywordTrajectory.description: The hard keyword string targeted for traditional search engine spiders inside the H1.

shadowQuestionIntercept.description: The bitemporal longtail query typing out customer frustration used to optimize the Meta Title tag.

targetNodeId.description: The destination URL ID managed by Harvester bidirectional routing.

anchorTextParameter.description: The entity-dense anchor text parameter used to pass link equity.

didacticAltText.description: The instructional code block used to teach spatial relationship data context to VLMs.

coreOfferId.description: The downstream monetization node mapped straight to the page wireframe splitter.
